metadata.description: Reforges raw prompts into technique-optimized, model-fitted enchantments. 16 techniques, 10+ model profiles, automatic scoring.

plugins.name: prompt-crafter
plugins.description: Creates technique-optimized, model-fitted prompts from task descriptions with explained reasoning and quality scoring.

plugins.name: prompt-refiner
plugins.description: Improves existing prompts — diagnoses weaknesses, re-selects techniques, adapts format, preserves intent.
